title: Advanced Pod Configuration — Pod and container level security context configuration
text:
The
Security context
field in the Pod specification provides granular control over security settings for Pods and containers.

Some aspects of security apply to the whole Pod; for other aspects,
you might want to set a default, without any container-level overrides.
Here's an example of using
securityContext
at the Pod level:
apiVersion
:
v1
kind
:
Pod
metadata
:
name
:
security-context-demo
spec
:
securityContext
:
# This applies to the entire Pod
runAsUser
:
1000
runAsGroup
:
3000
fsGroup
:
2000
containers
:
-
name
:
sec-ctx-demo
image
:
registry.k8s.io/e2e-test-images/agnhost:2.45
command
:
[
"sh"
,
"-c"
,
"sleep 1h"
]
